name: instinct
description: Skills and tools to help agents and users make better, calculated decisions.

interface.shortDescription: 54 strategy and decision frameworks as slash commands.
interface.longDescription: Run SWOT, OKR, First Principles, Pre-Mortem, RICE, and 49 more frameworks directly in your terminal. No tab switching. No blank-page paralysis. Type a command, describe your situation, get a structured analysis.
